name: build-visionos-apps
description: Build, run, debug, refactor, and ship visionOS 26 apps with XcodeBuildMCP-first Apple Vision Pro workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Build, run, debug, refactor, and ship visionOS 26 apps with XcodeBuildMCP-first workflows
interface.longDescription: visionOS 26 development for Apple Vision Pro: shared platform skills from visionOSAgents for spatial SwiftUI, RealityKit, ARKit, SharePlay, WidgetKit, immersive media, Shader Graph, USD, and coding standards, plus plugin-local XcodeBuildMCP-first workflow skills for build/run/debug, testing, signing, telemetry, SwiftPM, packaging, UI automation, command entrypoints, and Run-button fallback bootstrap. AXe and asc are optional external CLIs used only by the skills that document them.
interface.defaultPrompt: Build, run, debug, structure, or refactor a visionOS 26 app with XcodeBuildMCP on Apple Vision Pro Simulator, choose the right window, volume, or immersive surface, capture logs or debugger state, inspect RealityKit, ARKit, and SharePlay behavior, or prepare packaging workflows with optional external CLIs only when available.
